meaning: n.放各种各样物品的容器,包罗甚广的话(或法律等)adj.包罗万象的n.装零杂物品的容器
examples: Indigestion is a catchall term for any kind of stomach distress.
Globalization is a catchall to describe increased international trade.
This makes this single check a catchall for all the problems you might run into.
This would be a deviation from the catchall role they currently play in the bargaining process.
One of the solutions on the docket, particularly for urban infrastructure, is the catchall term public-private partnerships.
